results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Scale-floor confirm at 2.5. June execution surge (600+ YTD, 39+ political, children on death row, Marefati imminent risk, 88-day internet shutdown lifted May 26) deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category 0.0 threshold. Escalation reinforces; no movement below floor-adjacent anchor.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: Boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline (~30,000 workers) materializes an already-priced layoff (consistent with EMP 1.2). WARN-avoidance theories + WA/MO/NJ WARN remain FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED -> not scorable. Adverse WARN adjudication would likely push into Critical.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor confirm at 2.3. NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT re-affirmed: Ebola Bundibugyo (381/64; PHEIC; no vaccine; Uganda/Kampala spread; 45% contact-trace) + ~26.5M concurrent hunger are an exogenous shock revealing priced incapacity, no documented deliberate state obstruction. Disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, NOT Republic of Congo at 20.3).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Confirm-with-watch at 10.2 (deep Critical). Two NEW sovereign-enforcement actions assessed against the filed-but-unadjudicated/scorable line: MA AG $100M MassHealth fraud suit (May 29; alleged decade-long 2015-2025 SCO upcoding pattern, treble to ~$300M) and AZ AG 8-insurer + MultiPlan algorithmic price-fixing cartel suit (June 1). Both are newly-FILED civil complaints (no liability/settlement) -> NOT independently scorable; they raise sovereign-enforcement DENSITY (converging with the priced DOJ MA-billing probe) but REINFORCE not REVEAL the near-floor ACC 1.125/EMP 1.25 profile. Modeled aggressive multi-dimension downgrade reaches only -2.0 (entity already priced near absolute floor). ANNOUNCED-NOT-VERIFIED prior-auth pledge re-affirmed non-creditable.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. June 2 mass strike on Kyiv/Dnipro and other cities (73 missiles + 656 drones; 22 civilians killed incl. 2 children, 145 injured incl. 8 children; civilian infrastructure across 8 Kyiv districts; OHCHR-confirmed) plus Putin's rejection of direct talks is active-perpetration that REINFORCES the absolute floor. Entity at 0.0 (harm-flag override) cannot move lower; no proposal possible.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. 33.7M requiring assistance (highest globally); 19.5M acutely food insecure; famine confirmed in 2 NEW Darfur areas this cycle; third year of SAF/RSF war. CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR; further famine-area confirmation reinforces but cannot move lower.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Pentagon $200M classified access (MILITARY-AI-BY-CONTRACT: xAI 0.0 floor, NOT net-neutral as for Anthropic/OpenAI), Sen. Warren safety demands, documented harmful outputs reinforce the floor. Entity at absolute 0.0 (harm-flag override) cannot move lower; no proposal possible.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. ICC arrest-warrant APPLICATION against Min Aung Hlaing (filed Nov 2024 for Rohingya deportation/persecution, judges' issuance still pending) is an EXTERNAL accountability process against the entity, NOT a conduct change; continued airstrikes / 5.2M displaced / 15,000+ killed 2025 reinforce active perpetration. Already at absolute floor; cannot move lower.

results.name: CVS Health
results.key_finding: Confirm at 25.6. FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED re-affirmed: 340B $250M diversion suits (May 21; Mount Sinai/U-Kansas/U-Michigan; audit refused, agreements terminated; RICO) + AI-copyright matter reinforce, not reveal, the near-floor ACC 1.75/EQU 1.75 profile. Not independently scorable pre-adjudication.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: DUPLICATE-SUPPRESSED at the APPLIED 15.6 baseline. The ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT (22.7->15.6, Developing->Critical) was already APPLIED 2026-06-04, so the working baseline is 15.6 not 22.7. 06-03 evidence (1,500+ Bengali Muslims expelled incl. citizens; 40+ sea-toss; 145 disappeared) is corroborating continuation of the SAME directed refoulement-and-expulsion regime already priced. No magnitude change; no duplicate proposal.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Confirm at 25.0. OCCUPATION-ATTRIBUTION-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT re-affirmed: fragile ceasefire, 700+ killed since October, 77% food insecure are substantially externally/occupying-power-attributable harm. The 25.0 baseline prices the assessed entity's own limited-capacity governance; externally-driven harm is not double-counted. No scorable movement.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. 7.8M (56%) acutely food insecure; 73,300 catastrophic IPC Phase 5 (+160%); four counties at famine risk. CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR (SAF/SPLM-IO access denial). Already at absolute floor; escalation reinforces.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at 0.0. Decree No.12 (domestic violence criminalized only on broken bones/visible injury; 15-day sentence) + Decree No.18 (spousal-separation restrictions) + broader regulation targeting women/minorities are codified active-perpetration. UNSC UNAMA mandate (June 17 deadline) is an external-process milestone, not a conduct change. Already at absolute floor; cannot move lower.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Confirm-with-watch at 28.4 under STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX. Six-week insurrection met with terrorism+narco charges against COB chief Argollo + 24 officials, a masked-men unmarked-vehicle seizure of La Paz Fejuve secretary Apaza, and 6-month preventive detention. Genuine INT/ACC/BND/EMP pressure, BUT situation in flux/contested (court suspended the Argollo terrorism warrant; cabinet split dialogue-vs-repression -> residual rule-of-law friction) and REINFORCES an already-low Developing profile. Modeled multi-dimension downgrade -2.5 -> sub-threshold, non-band-crossing.

results.name: Alphabet/Google
results.key_finding: Net-neutral confirm at 40.0 (the only assessed entity where a NEW signal could plausibly drive UPWARD movement). UK CMA June 3 world-first conduct ruling forces Google to give publishers AI Overviews/AI Mode/Gemini/Vertex opt-out (no ranking penalty), fine-tuning opt-out, and proper attribution -- but it is a COMPELLED remedy following an ADVERSE finding (inverse of a creditable I2/AB2 self-correction), with a 9-month implementation runway, zero delivered effect yet (ANNOUNCED-NOT-OPERATIONALIZED), UK-only. Compelled-positive and adverse-finding-negative offset. Modeled generous credit +0.9 -> sub-threshold. BOUNDARY CASE: sits exactly at the 40.0/41 Developing-Functional line.

results.name: Sao Tome and Principe
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 48.4 (no acute news event). Stable Functional profile; EQU 2.5 single laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Kiribati
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 39.1 (no acute news event). Climate-displacement pressure is continuation of priced conditions. Stable Developing profile. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Romania
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 37.5 (no acute news event). Standing Roma-minority/prison-conditions/judicial-independence concerns are priced continuation. EQU 2.0 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Oman
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 37.5 (no acute news event). Standing civil-liberties/migrant-worker concerns are priced continuation. EQU 2.0 laggard. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Malaysia
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 46.9 (no acute news event). Standing expression-restriction/refugee-policy concerns are priced continuation. EQU 2.5 / INT 2.5 laggards. Reconstruction exact; no math-hygiene flag.

carry-forward; verified delivery of the CMA opt-out/attribution remedy (~9 months) + EU/other-jurisdiction replication could push into Functional; adverse AI-Overviews antitrust finding could pressure downward

data_hygiene_flags.note: Disambiguation re-confirmed: composite-2.3 entity (rank 181, 'Democratic Republic of C') = DRC, NOT Republic of Congo (rank 148, composite 20.3). Ebola/hunger evidence applied to the correct baseline.

Working baseline is the APPLIED 15.6 (ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT applied 2026-06-04), not the pre-reweight 22.7. 06-03 evidence is same-window continuation; duplicate-suppressed, no new proposal.

data_hygiene_flags.slug: russia / sudan / south-sudan / afghanistan / myanmar / xai-grok
data_hygiene_flags.note: Published at the absolute 0.0 floor (all dimensions 1.0, harm-flag override). New adverse evidence reinforces but cannot move the floor; no proposal possible.

methodology_rulings.ruling: The two NEW state-AG actions (MA AG $100M MassHealth upcoding-fraud suit, May 29; AZ AG MultiPlan + 8-insurer algorithmic price-fixing cartel suit, June 1) were assessed specifically against whether they cross from filed-but-unadjudicated to scorable. RULING: NOT yet scorable -- both are newly-filed civil complaints with no liability finding, settlement, or injunction. They are sovereign (state-AG) enforcement, a higher evidentiary tier than private litigation, and the MA suit alleges a documented decade-long (2015-2025) upcoding PATTERN that strengthens the AB4 systemic-recurrence read and CONVERGES with the already-priced DOJ MA-billing probe -- raising enforcement DENSITY. But they REINFORCE rather than REVEAL the near-floor profile (ACC 1.125, EMP 1.25, EQU 1.25). Modeled aggressive multi-dimension downgrade reaches only -2.0 (entity already priced near absolute floor) -> sub-threshold. Confirm-with-watch; converts to scorable on adverse adjudication/settlement of the DOJ probe or either AG suit.

The UK CMA June 3 world-first conduct ruling (publisher opt-out from AI Overviews/AI Mode/Gemini/Vertex without ranking penalty; fine-tuning opt-out; proper attribution; 9-month implementation; compliance reporting) is the only NEW signal this cycle that could plausibly drive UPWARD movement. RULING: net-neutral. A regulator-IMPOSED remedy following an ADVERSE finding is the inverse of a creditable self-initiated correction (AB2/I2) -- it is the materialization of a documented harm (Google extracted publisher value until compelled to stop), not a compassion improvement. The future-positive (delivered opt-out/attribution improves treatment of low-power creators) is discounted by ANNOUNCED-NOT-OPERATIONALIZED (9-month runway, zero delivered effect, UK-only) and offset by the adverse-finding-disclosure negative. Modeled generous credit +0.9 -> sub-threshold. BOUNDARY CASE at the 40.0/41 Developing-Functional line.

Terrorism+narco charges against COB chief Argollo + 24 union officials, a masked-men unmarked-vehicle seizure of La Paz Fejuve secretary Apaza, and 6-month preventive detention amid a six-week insurrection are genuine INT/ACC/BND/EMP pressures. RULING: scorable-but-sub-threshold. The situation is in flux and partly contested -- a court SUSPENDED the Argollo terrorism warrant and the cabinet is split dialogue-vs-repression, indicating residual rule-of-law friction rather than uniform directed repression -- and the conduct REINFORCES an already-low Developing profile (ACC 1.8, ACT 1.9, EQU 1.9) rather than revealing a discrete adjudicated mass-harm. Modeled multi-dimension downgrade -2.5 -> sub-threshold, non-band-crossing. Confirm-with-watch; converts on a documented mass-casualty crackdown, martial law with verified violations, or confirmed enforced disappearances.

Re-affirmed. Russia (June 2 Kyiv/Dnipro mass strike: 22 civilians incl. 2 children killed, 145 injured, civilian infrastructure, talks rejected -- direct active perpetration), Myanmar (continued airstrikes; ICC arrest-warrant application is an EXTERNAL process against the entity, not a conduct change), Afghanistan (codified gender persecution via Decrees 12/18), and xAI/Grok (Pentagon $200M classified access compounding a floored profile; documented harmful outputs) are at the absolute 0.0 floor (harm-flag override). New adverse evidence reinforces but cannot move the floor lower; no proposal possible.

Re-affirmed. Sudan (33.7M need; 19.5M food insecure; 2 NEW Darfur famine areas; SAF/RSF) and South Sudan (7.8M/56%; 73,300 IPC Phase 5 +160%; four counties at famine risk; SAF/SPLM-IO access denial) sustain the active-perpetration 0.0 floor via state-attributable constrained humanitarian access. Already at absolute floor; escalation reinforces.

Re-affirmed. Ebola Bundibugyo (381/64; PHEIC; no vaccine; Uganda/Kampala spread; 45% contact-trace) + ~26.5M concurrent hunger are an exogenous shock revealing already-priced state-response incapacity, absent documented deliberate state obstruction. Near-floor 2.3; no double-count. Disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, not Republic of Congo).

Re-affirmed. Fragile ceasefire, 700+ killed since October, 77% food insecure are substantially externally/occupying-power-attributable harm. The 25.0 baseline prices the assessed entity's own limited-capacity governance; externally-driven harm is not double-counted into a further downgrade of this entity. No scorable movement.

Re-affirmed at floor-adjacent 2.5. June execution surge (600+ YTD; 39+ political; children on death row; Marefati imminent risk; 88-day internet shutdown lifted May 26) deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold. Escalation reinforces; no movement below the scale-floor anchor.

Re-affirmed. CVS 340B $250M diversion suits (May 21; audit refused, agreements terminated; RICO) + AI-copyright matter, and Oracle WARN-avoidance theories (remote-reclassification; WA/MO/NJ WARN) reinforce already-priced near-floor profiles and are not independently scorable pre-adjudication. Oracle June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline materializes an already-priced layoff (no new score).
Re-affirmed. The ~50-insurer prior-auth pledge remains announced/in-progress, not verified for delivered effect -> not creditable as an upgrade against the near-floor baseline. Net-neutral.

06-03 evidence (1,500+ Bengali Muslims expelled incl. citizens; 40+ sea-toss; 145 disappeared) is same-window continuation of the directed refoulement-and-expulsion regime already priced by the ACTIVE-STATE-PERPETRATION-REWEIGHT applied 2026-06-04 (22.7->15.6). Working baseline is the applied 15.6. No magnitude change; per instruction NO duplicate proposal created.

framing_corrections.correction: The published near-floor ACC 1.125 already prices a pattern of billing-conduct enforcement; the two NEW state-AG suits (MA Medicaid fraud, AZ price-fixing cartel) raise sovereign-enforcement density and corroborate a decade-long upcoding pattern, but as filed-but-unadjudicated matters they reinforce rather than reveal. Leading reassessment trigger if any of the three converging sovereign actions (DOJ probe, MA AG, AZ AG) reaches merits/settlement.

The published INT 2.1 / EQU 2.4 captured Google's pre-CMA posture toward publishers. The CMA ruling is a compelled remedy (not a creditable self-correction) at the 40.0/41 boundary; a verified delivered opt-out/attribution remedy in ~9 months could warrant a future EQU/BND/ACC upgrade into Functional.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: The clearest test of the filed-but-unadjudicated boundary this cycle: TWO new sovereign (state-AG) enforcement actions in one window -- MA AG's $100M MassHealth suit alleging a decade-long (2015-2025) SCO upcoding scheme (treble to ~$300M), and AZ AG's 8-insurer + MultiPlan algorithmic price-fixing cartel suit. RULING: not yet scorable (newly-filed, no liability/settlement), but they materially raise sovereign-enforcement DENSITY converging with the priced DOJ MA-billing probe and corroborate a documented systemic pattern. Because the entity is already priced near the absolute floor (10.2), even an aggressive modeled downgrade reaches only -2.0 (sub-threshold). Confirm-with-watch; the strongest reassessment trigger of the cycle on any merits adjudication/settlement.

The only assessed entity where a NEW signal could plausibly drive UPWARD movement, and a new methodology framing: COMPELLED-REMEDY-NOT-SELF-CORRECTION. The UK CMA's world-first conduct ruling forcing publisher opt-out + attribution from Google's AI features is a regulator-imposed remedy following an adverse finding -- the inverse of a creditable self-correction -- with a 9-month runway, zero delivered effect, and UK-only scope. Compelled-positive and adverse-finding-negative offset to net-neutral (+0.9 modeled). BOUNDARY CASE at exactly the 40.0/41 Developing-Functional line; verified delivery + jurisdiction replication is the upgrade trigger.

Floor confirmation at 0.0 with significant active-perpetration reinforcement: the June 2 mass strike on Kyiv/Dnipro and other cities (73 missiles + 656 drones) killed 22 civilians including 2 children and injured 145, struck civilian infrastructure across 8 Kyiv districts (OHCHR-confirmed), and was accompanied by Putin's rejection of direct talks. Already at the absolute floor (harm-flag override), the entity cannot move lower -- the evidence reinforces rather than changes the designation.

oracle (BOUNDARY 0.6pt above Critical: court/regulator finding on the remote-reclassification WARN-avoidance theory or WA/MO/NJ WARN -> likely Critical; June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline)

iran (escalation to multi-category extremity vs verified halt to political executions)

sudan / south-sudan (verified ceasefire with humanitarian-corridor opening -> first improvement signal; further famine-area confirmations reinforce)
democratic-republic-of-c (documented deliberate state obstruction of the Ebola response -> escalation toward active-perpetration)

afghanistan (reversal of gender-persecution decrees -> first improvement signal; UNAMA mandate June 17)
india (nationwide STF deportation scale-up / NEW mass-casualty refoulement -> movement toward floor; halt/reversal -> re-upgrade; the 06-04 applied 15.6 is the authoritative baseline)

rotation set (sao-tome / kiribati / romania / oman / malaysia: stable; reassess on any acute event)
validator_notes: validate-indexes.mjs run: 12750 checks passed, 0 errors, 128 warnings. NONE of the 128 warnings falls among the 20 entities assessed this cycle (the warnings are unrelated entities, e.g. Vermont, Minnesota, Houston, Texas, and band-boundary informational notices on cities/states). No math-hygiene flag for any assessed entity.

All 20 assessed baselines reconstruct EXACTLY (diff 0.00) via computeCompositeFromDimensions: Iran 2.5, Oracle 20.6, DRC 2.3, UnitedHealth 10.2, CVS 25.6, Alphabet 40.0, Bolivia 28.4, Palestine 25.0, Russia/Sudan/South Sudan/Afghanistan/Myanmar 0.0, xAI 0.0, India 15.6 (applied baseline), and the five rotation entities (Sao Tome 48.4, Kiribati 39.1, Romania 37.5, Oman 37.5, Malaysia 46.9). No simple-mean false positives flagged.

ZERO change-proposals written this cycle. Six floor confirmations (Russia, Sudan, South Sudan, Afghanistan, Myanmar, xAI -- cannot move below 0.0). India duplicate-suppressed (same-window continuation of the 06-04 applied reweight). UnitedHealth, Bolivia, Alphabet scorable-but-sub-threshold (-2.0, -2.5, +0.9 respectively). All others confirmed.
ZERO band crossings. TWO boundary cases flagged: Oracle (20.6, 0.6pt above Critical) and Alphabet/Google (40.0, exactly at Developing/Functional) -- both carry-forward, no proposal.
DRC disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3 entity, rank 181, NOT Republic of Congo at 20.3 rank 148).
No change-proposals other than the (none created) 2026-06-03 set were created or modified. The existing backlog and the pending items were left as-is.
methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained. NEW this cycle: COMPELLED-REMEDY-NOT-SELF-CORRECTION (alphabet-google; regulator-imposed remedy following an adverse finding is net-neutral, not a creditable self-correction; boundary case), STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX (bolivia; scorable-but-sub-threshold, discounted by contested/in-flux rule-of-law friction). Extended: FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED to sovereign-enforcement DENSITY (unitedhealth; two converging state-AG suits raise density and corroborate a decade-long pattern but remain non-scorable pre-merits, and the entity is already near floor). Re-affirmed: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR (russia/myanmar/afghanistan/xai), CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR (sudan/south-sudan), NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (drc), OCCUPATION-ATTRIBUTION-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT (palestine), SCALE-FLOOR (iran), ANNOUNCED-NOT-VERIFIED (unitedhealth), DUPLICATE-SUPPRESSION (india).
